title: tafalla cumbalensis
intro: Tafalla cumbalensis, also known as Cymbopogon tafallensis, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Tafalla cumbalensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tafalla cumbalensis can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils for topical application, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
